data.name: Monster Girl Jungle
data.detailed_description:
Ever been lost in a big, dark jungle filled with hypnotic monster girls? Now it’s time to experience it with both your mind and body.

Monster Girl Jungle is a Visual Novel mixed with Sandbox elements, a 2D Hentai Game. You explore the jungle, where you have the opportunity to meet hypnotic monster girls who want to get to know you - and test your willpower...

Each girl has her own kinks and a unique hypnotic method to gently pull you into sweet submission through their power.

Some may see you as a lover, maybe as a servant - or perhaps nothing more than prey for their own amusement.

Zelra

  • Your first encounter is with Zelra, the lamia girl. Just look at her mesmerizing brown skin, those sparkling eyes, the shimmering snake scales of her lower body… but something’s wrong. Her eyes begin to glow and you can’t look away. Her tail slowly coils around your waist. Will you resist her… or surrender completely?

Tia

  • Your second encounter will be with Tia, the hellhound girl. She is currently being worked on for the next update.

???

Not released yet.

???

Not released yet.

Spend time with these adorable yet dangerous monster girls, maybe you will find another side of them wich you can fall in love or droll in pleasure.

How long will it take before you give in to their touch… or their powers? The deeper you pursue them, the more blissful the night that awaits you.

Did the description awaken your horny curiosity? If so, make sure to add the game to your wishlist so you’ll know exactly when it’s time to play this hypnosis-focused game.

data.short_description: Adventure through a dangerous jungle🌿, where monster girls await you.💗 Will you resist when these seductive creatures make their move🌀 or will you surrender? ➰

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 240 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.6 or later
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 240 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 240 MB 可用空間
